occupation: Head - South Region at Kinetic Pakistan
headline: Business Unit Head at Kinetic Pakistan | Award-Winning Leader in OOH Advertising | Adtech, Innovation & Programmatic DOOH Expert | Retail Media &…
summary:
As the Business Unit Head at Kinetic Pakistan, the nation's largest Out-of-Home (OOH) advertisement agency, I am passionate about pushing the boundaries of traditional advertising. Over the past 8 years, I have led the largest business units, consistently delivering exceptional results and winning numerous awards, including the prestigious Effie Awards and the OOH All Rounder Award from Unilever.

My expertise extends to spearheading our programmatic Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) portfolio, where I drive innovation and implement cutting-edge strategies to enhance our clients' campaigns. With a strong focus on leveraging technology and data-driven insights, I ensure our solutions are both impactful and forward-thinking.

In addition to my work in programmatic DOOH, I specialize in retail media and bank branding. I have successfully collaborated with leading retail brands and financial institutions to create dynamic advertising solutions that captivate audiences and drive engagement. My approach integrates traditional and digital media, providing a holistic strategy that maximizes brand visibility and impact.

In my role, I am committed to fostering a culture of creativity and excellence, continuously exploring new avenues to elevate the OOH advertising landscape in Pakistan.

recommendations:
Javed Jafri

Talal Qureshi is among the very best in the out-of-home industry.A true data expert, numbers cruncher, and tech-savvy innovator who drives scalable outdoor innovation ( best in South Asia) What sets him apart is growth mindset,  ownership, commitment, and grit — always pushing for bigger and greater things. Even under pressure, Talal stays calm, focused, and delivers. For me, hes a rare doer — someone who can turn things around in hours, not days.He has proven to be an amazing team player, dreamer and living his purpose. Talal always stands out. Ill not comment on his tech expertise ( best in class).  Few projects  I can vouch for Unilever Safety Agenda, Rolling out Safety protocols for the industry. Outdoor innovation countless :) For me Kinetic is lucky to have him - just keep up the momentum. Showcase your great work be it on any client. Stay humble and grounded - you will shine my friend 👏👏👏👏👏👏👏👏

Zona Siddiqui

I have known Tala for quite a long time, and it has always been a pleasure working alongside him. He is extremely hardworking, highly creative, and brings fresh ideas with a very down-to-earth and simple approach. Talas ability to combine dedication with innovation makes him stand out in any project or team he is part of. I truly admire his work ethic and positivity, and I am confident he will continue to achieve great things
